name: job-match
description: Deterministic job-posting fit scorer exposed over MCP. The MCP tools (score_posting, batch_score) and the criteria:// resource are fully offline: no network calls, no API keys.

tools.name: score_posting
tools.description: Score one pasted job posting against the local rubric. Offline.

tools.name: batch_score
tools.description: Score a list of pasted job postings. Offline.

network.description: The MCP tools themselves contact no network endpoint. The endpoints below are used only by the optional FastAPI web app bundled in this repository (python -m app.main), and only for its opt-in keyword-search and Claude-verdict features. All job-board traffic goes through the single seam app/providers/http.get_json.

allowed_hosts.used_by: web app keyword search (JSearch board, metered)
web app optional Claude fit-verdict layer (Anthropic SDK)
